requirement_topic.en: Authorized Colombian Importer / CRC Representative — Registration and DIAN Customs Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 授权哥伦比亚进口商 / CRC代表——注册及DIAN海关要求
requirement_topic.zht: 授權哥倫比亞進口商 / CRC代表——註冊及DIAN海關要求

summary.en: An authorized Colombian importer or local representative is required for the CRC homologación process and for customs clearance in Colombia. The importer or representative must register with the CRC to act as the responsible party for homologated equipment on the Colombian market. For customs clearance, the importer must be registered with DIAN (Dirección de Impuestos y Aduanas Nacionales — the Colombian customs and tax authority) with a valid RUT (Registro Único Tributario, the Colombian tax identification number). DIAN requires the following import documentation: commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin (for applicable tariff preference or as required), and CRC homologación certificate (or evidence of pending homologación for certain categories). Spanish-language labelling identifying the Colombian importer's name and address must appear on the product. Chinese exporters without an established Colombian presence must appoint and contract a qualified Colombian importer or customs agent before shipment. INVIMA (national food and drug authority) is not involved for consumer electronics and wireless devices.
summary.zh: CRC型式认可程序及哥伦比亚海关清关均要求有授权哥伦比亚进口商或当地代表。进口商或代表须在CRC注册，作为哥伦比亚市场上已认可设备的责任方。海关清关时，进口商须在DIAN（哥伦比亚国家税务和海关局）注册，持有有效RUT（哥伦比亚统一税务登记号，即哥伦比亚税务识别号）。DIAN要求以下进口文件：商业发票、装箱单、原产地证书（适用关税优惠或按要求）以及CRC型式认可证书（或特定类别待认可证明）。产品上的西班牙语标签须标注哥伦比亚进口商的名称和地址。在哥伦比亚无既有业务存在的中国出口商须在发货前委任并签约合格的哥伦比亚进口商或报关代理。INVIMA（国家食品和药品管理局）不参与消费电子和无线设备事务。
summary.zht: CRC型式認可程序及哥倫比亞海關清關均要求有授權哥倫比亞進口商或當地代表。進口商或代表須在CRC註冊，作為哥倫比亞市場上已認可裝置的責任方。海關清關時，進口商須在DIAN（哥倫比亞國家稅務和海關局）註冊，持有有效RUT（哥倫比亞統一稅務登記號，即哥倫比亞稅務識別號）。DIAN要求以下進口文件：商業發票、裝箱單、原產地證書（適用關稅優惠或按要求）以及CRC型式認可證書（或特定類別待認可證明）。產品上的西班牙語標籤須標注哥倫比亞進口商的名稱和地址。在哥倫比亞無既有業務存在的中國出口商須在發貨前委任並簽約合格的哥倫比亞進口商或報關代理。INVIMA（國家食品和藥品管理局）不參與消費電子和無線裝置事務。

standards_or_laws: CRC homologación regulations — authorized Colombian importer or representative required for CRC registration and responsible-party designation
DIAN (Dirección de Impuestos y Aduanas Nacionales) — Colombian customs and tax authority; RUT registration required for importers
RUT (Registro Único Tributario) — Colombian tax identification number required for all import operations
DIAN import documentation requirements — commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin, and CRC homologación certificate
Colombian consumer protection law (Ley 1480 de 2011) — importer identity must appear on Spanish-language product label

summary.en: In China, foreign manufacturers selling wireless and electronic devices must typically work through a Chinese importer or establish a WFOE (Wholly Foreign-Owned Enterprise) with a valid business licence and tax registration. The Chinese importer holds CCC certification responsibility for imported products and manages customs clearance through China Customs (GACC — General Administration of Customs of China). Import documentation for China includes commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading, customs declaration form, and CCC certificate. China does not require a separate CRC-style radio equipment representative registration — SRRC type approval and CCC are product-level certifications applied for by the manufacturer or their Chinese agent. GACC registration may be required for certain food-contact or specialized categories, but is not applicable to general wireless/IoT devices.
summary.zh: 在中国，外国制造商销售无线和电子设备通常须通过中国进口商或设立具有有效营业执照和税务登记的外商独资企业（WFOE）。中国进口商对进口产品承担CCC认证责任，并通过中国海关（GACC——中国海关总署）办理清关。中国进口文件包括商业发票、装箱单、提单、报关单和CCC证书。中国不要求类似CRC的无线设备代表注册——SRRC型号核准和CCC为产品级认证，由制造商或其中国代理申请。GACC注册可能适用于特定食品接触或专业类别，但不适用于一般无线/物联网设备。
summary.zht: 在中國，外國製造商銷售無線和電子裝置通常須通過中國進口商或設立具有有效營業執照和稅務登記的外商獨資企業（WFOE）。中國進口商對進口產品承擔CCC認證責任，並通過中國海關（GACC——中國海關總署）辦理清關。中國進口文件包括商業發票、裝箱單、提單、報關單和CCC證書。中國不要求類似CRC的無線裝置代表註冊——SRRC型號核准和CCC為產品級認證，由製造商或其中國代理申請。GACC註冊可能適用於特定食品接觸或專業類別，但不適用於一般無線/物聯網裝置。

standards_or_laws: GACC (General Administration of Customs of China) — Chinese customs authority; manages import clearance and documentation
China import documentation — commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading, customs declaration, CCC certificate for in-scope products
CCC certification (CNCA) — product-level mandatory certification applied for by manufacturer or Chinese agent; separate from importer registration
China foreign business entry — WFOE or licensed importer arrangement required for foreign manufacturers selling in China

gap.en: Colombia requires an authorized local importer or representative registered with the CRC — this is an entity-level registration obligation separate from product-level homologación. Chinese exporters without Colombian legal presence must appoint and contract a qualified Colombian importer before applying for CRC homologación and before shipment. The Colombian importer's identity must appear on the Spanish-language product label. DIAN requires RUT registration and standard import documentation including the CRC homologación certificate at customs. China does not impose an equivalent CRC-style representative registration for foreign wireless device exporters — the Chinese system is primarily product-level (SRRC + CCC) rather than importer-registration-based. Colombian importers may also be subject to Cámara de Comercio registration and sector-specific obligations.
gap.zh: 哥伦比亚要求在CRC注册的授权当地进口商或代表——这是与产品级型式认可分离的实体级注册义务。在哥伦比亚无法律存在的中国出口商须在申请CRC型式认可和发货前委任并签约合格的哥伦比亚进口商。哥伦比亚进口商的信息须标注于产品的西班牙语标签上。DIAN要求海关时提供RUT注册及标准进口文件，包括CRC型式认可证书。中国对外国无线设备出口商不强制要求类似CRC代表注册——中国体系主要为产品级（SRRC + CCC），而非基于进口商注册。哥伦比亚进口商还可能须办理商会登记并承担行业特定义务。
gap.zht: 哥倫比亞要求在CRC註冊的授權當地進口商或代表——這是與產品級型式認可分離的實體級註冊義務。在哥倫比亞無法律存在的中國出口商須在申請CRC型式認可和發貨前委任並簽約合格的哥倫比亞進口商。哥倫比亞進口商的資訊須標注於產品的西班牙語標籤上。DIAN要求海關時提供RUT註冊及標準進口文件，包括CRC型式認可證書。中國對外國無線裝置出口商不強制要求類似CRC代表註冊——中國體系主要為產品級（SRRC + CCC），而非基於進口商註冊。哥倫比亞進口商還可能須辦理商會登記並承擔行業特定義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — authorized Colombian importer or CRC-registered representative required before CRC homologación can be obtained; DIAN RUT registration and import documentation (including CRC certificate) required for customs clearance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for import — Chinese importer or WFOE with GACC registration and business licence required; CCC certification responsibility held by importer for in-scope imported products

source.publisher: DIAN — Dirección de Impuestos y Aduanas Nacionales (Colombia)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia requires an authorized importer or CRC-registered representative with a valid DIAN RUT before CRC homologación can proceed and before customs clearance. Chinese exporters without Colombian legal presence must appoint a qualified Colombian importer or agent. DIAN import documentation must include the CRC homologación certificate. The importer's identity must appear on the Spanish-language product label. Verify current CRC representative registration requirements and DIAN import procedures with a qualified Colombian regulatory and customs professional before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚要求在CRC型式认可申请前及海关清关前，持有有效DIAN RUT的授权进口商或CRC注册代表。在哥伦比亚无法律存在的中国出口商须委任合格的哥伦比亚进口商或代理。DIAN进口文件须包含CRC型式认可证书。进口商信息须标注于产品西班牙语标签上。发货前请向合格的哥伦比亚监管和海关专业人士核验现行CRC代表注册要求和DIAN进口程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞要求在CRC型式認可申請前及海關清關前，持有有效DIAN RUT的授權進口商或CRC註冊代表。在哥倫比亞無法律存在的中國出口商須委任合格的哥倫比亞進口商或代理。DIAN進口文件須包含CRC型式認可證書。進口商資訊須標注於產品西班牙語標籤上。發貨前請向合格的哥倫比亞監管和海關專業人士核驗現行CRC代表註冊要求和DIAN進口程序。
